case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP) VS. MARIA ALEJANDRA JIMENEZ MARTINEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-09-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-09-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-09-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DONNA FLORES--LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALISTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JIMENEZ MARTINEZ, MARIA ALEJANDRA $791.96 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $866.96 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT JIMENEZ MARTINEZ, MARIA ALEJANDRA

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $791.96 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP) AS TO DEFENDANT JIMENEZ MARTINEZ, MARIA ALEJANDRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-09-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 45.00 - SERVED MAY-12-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JIMENEZ MARTINEZ, MARIA ALEJANDRA
